description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of dark stone or brick and large glass panels, especially on the upper floor, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house includes a spacious balcony or terrace on the second floor, with outdoor seating visible, and a large patio area on the ground floor. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained grassy lawn surrounding it. The rear of the house appears to have a garage or utility area with multiple doors, while the front showcases a prominent entryway and large windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark stone exterior, large windows, and spacious balconies and patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a covered patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive balcony, outdoor seating, and large glass panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage or utility area with multiple doors and a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the garage section and the solid, windowless wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large door, covered porch, and minimal decorative elements emphasizing clean lines
